Scheme.Description: renders xsl:otherwise when no xsl:when matches
Scheme.Template: <xsl:stylesheet xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform"> <xsl:template match="/page/item"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="@id = '1'"> <xsl:value-of select="'one'"/> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="@id = '2'"> <xsl:value-of select="'two'"/> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="'other'"/> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>
